categories.name: Bedroom
categories.whenToUse: An indoor private bedroom — someone's own room, a bed present, intimate at-home scenes.
categories.notWhen: A paid hotel room -> hotel_room. A shared common area -> living_room.

categories.name: Living Room
categories.whenToUse: A home's shared common lounge — couch, relaxing together, family time.
categories.notWhen: A private sleeping room -> bedroom. An eat-in space -> dining_room.

categories.name: Kitchen
categories.whenToUse: A home kitchen — cooking, counters and appliances.
categories.notWhen: A restaurant's commercial kitchen still reads here; a place to eat -> dining_room.

categories.name: Dining Room
categories.whenToUse: A room centered on a dining table for shared meals at home.
categories.notWhen: A commercial eatery -> restaurant. A kitchen workspace -> kitchen.

categories.name: Bathroom
categories.whenToUse: A private indoor bathroom — sink, tub or shower, tiled.
categories.notWhen: A public hot-spring bath -> onsen_bathhouse. A locker/shower room -> locker_room.

categories.name: Home Office
categories.whenToUse: A study or home workspace — personal desk inside a home.
categories.notWhen: A corporate workplace with many desks -> office.

categories.name: Hallway
categories.whenToUse: An indoor corridor/landing connecting rooms inside a home or building.
categories.notWhen: A school corridor with lockers -> school_hallway.

categories.name: Attic
categories.whenToUse: A cramped top-of-house attic — rafters, storage, dusty light.
categories.notWhen: An underground storage -> basement.

categories.name: Basement
categories.whenToUse: An underground basement/cellar — concrete, pipes, dim.
categories.notWhen: A stone fantasy prison -> dungeon. An attic -> attic.

categories.name: Garage
categories.whenToUse: A home garage / mechanic bay — tools, concrete, a vehicle space.
categories.notWhen: An industrial making space -> workshop.

categories.name: Balcony
categories.whenToUse: A private balcony/veranda overlooking a city or landscape.
categories.notWhen: A flat building rooftop -> rooftop.

categories.name: Stairwell
categories.whenToUse: An indoor staircase / stairwell between floors.
categories.notWhen: A flat corridor -> hallway.

categories.name: Backyard
categories.whenToUse: A home's private back garden/yard — lawn, fence, patio.
categories.notWhen: A manicured public/ornamental garden -> garden. A park -> park.

categories.name: Porch
categories.whenToUse: The front porch/veranda of a house — steps, seating, the doorway.
categories.notWhen: A balcony above ground -> balcony.

categories.name: Suburban Street
categories.whenToUse: A calm residential neighbourhood street — houses, lawns, sidewalks.
categories.notWhen: A dense downtown street -> city_street.

categories.name: City Street
categories.whenToUse: A downtown/urban street — buildings, shops, traffic, sidewalks.
categories.notWhen: A narrow back passage between buildings -> alley. A quiet residential street -> suburban_street.

categories.name: City Square
categories.whenToUse: An open public plaza/town square — fountain, paving, surrounding facades.
categories.notWhen: A linear street -> city_street. A market with stalls -> market.

categories.name: Alley
categories.whenToUse: A tight back alley between buildings — gritty, enclosed, shadowy.
categories.notWhen: A wide main street -> city_street.

categories.name: Rooftop
categories.whenToUse: The flat roof of a tall building — city skyline view, exposed.
categories.notWhen: A private balcony attached to a room -> balcony.

categories.name: Bridge
categories.whenToUse: A bridge/overpass — spanning water or a road, railings and a long view.
categories.notWhen: A waterfront with docks -> harbor.

categories.name: Harbor
categories.whenToUse: A working waterfront — docks, piers, moored boats, the water's edge.
categories.notWhen: An open beach -> beach. A ship's deck at sea -> ship_deck.

categories.name: Parking Garage
categories.whenToUse: A concrete multi-level car park — pillars, bays, harsh lighting.
categories.notWhen: A home garage -> garage.

categories.name: Gas Station
categories.whenToUse: A roadside fuel station — pumps, canopy, convenience shop, forecourt.

categories.name: Construction Site
categories.whenToUse: An active building site — scaffolding, girders, cranes, raw materials.

categories.name: Train Station
categories.whenToUse: A train/subway/metro station — platform, tracks, the waiting area.
categories.notWhen: Inside a moving train car -> train_interior. An airport -> airport.

categories.name: Airport Terminal
categories.whenToUse: An airport terminal/concourse — gates, glass walls, the tarmac beyond.
categories.notWhen: Inside a plane cabin -> airplane_interior.

categories.name: Train Interior
categories.whenToUse: Inside a moving passenger train carriage — seats, aisle, windows.
categories.notWhen: A platform with tracks -> station.

categories.name: Bus Interior
categories.whenToUse: Inside a bus — seats, aisle, handrails, windows.
categories.notWhen: A train carriage -> train_interior.

categories.name: Airplane Cabin
categories.whenToUse: Inside an aircraft passenger cabin — aisle, seats, oval windows.
categories.notWhen: An airport building -> airport. A spaceship -> spaceship_interior.

categories.name: Car Interior
categories.whenToUse: Inside a car — dashboard, seats, the view through the windshield.
categories.notWhen: A bus or train interior -> bus_interior / train_interior.

categories.name: Elevator
categories.whenToUse: Inside an elevator cab — metal walls, button panel, enclosed.
categories.notWhen: A stairwell -> stairwell.

categories.name: Cafe
categories.whenToUse: A coffee shop / cafe — counter, small tables, casual warm vibe.
categories.notWhen: A full sit-down eatery -> restaurant. A bar/pub -> bar_tavern.

categories.name: Restaurant
categories.whenToUse: A sit-down restaurant dining room — set tables, ambient dining.
categories.notWhen: A coffee shop -> cafe. A drinking bar -> bar_tavern.

categories.name: Diner
categories.whenToUse: A retro roadside diner — counter, booths, chrome-and-neon americana.
categories.notWhen: A modern sit-down restaurant -> restaurant. A cafe -> cafe.

categories.name: Bar / Tavern
categories.whenToUse: A place to drink — modern bar, pub, lounge counter and stools.
categories.notWhen: A medieval/fantasy inn -> fantasy_tavern. A dance club -> nightclub.

categories.name: Nightclub
categories.whenToUse: A loud dance club — dance floor, colored lights, DJ, dark and energetic.
categories.notWhen: A quiet drinking bar -> bar_tavern.

categories.name: Shop
categories.whenToUse: A generic small store / convenience shop — shelves, counter, goods.
categories.notWhen: A large grocery -> supermarket. A mall -> shopping_mall. An open-air market -> market.

categories.name: Supermarket
categories.whenToUse: A large grocery store — long aisles, shelves, bright lighting.
categories.notWhen: A small shop -> shop. A mall -> shopping_mall.

categories.name: Shopping Mall
categories.whenToUse: An indoor shopping mall — multi-floor atrium, storefronts, escalators.
categories.notWhen: A single store -> shop. A market -> market.

categories.name: Market
categories.whenToUse: An open-air market / bazaar — stalls, awnings, goods, a busy lane.
categories.notWhen: An indoor mall -> shopping_mall. A single store -> shop.

categories.name: Bookstore
categories.whenToUse: A retail bookshop — packed shelves, reading nooks, cozy.
categories.notWhen: A grand reference library -> library.

categories.name: Office
categories.whenToUse: A workplace office — desks/cubicles, computers, corporate setting.
categories.notWhen: A personal study at home -> home_office.

categories.name: Factory
categories.whenToUse: An industrial factory floor — machinery, conveyors, pipes, catwalks.
categories.notWhen: A storage warehouse -> warehouse. A craft workshop -> workshop.

categories.name: Warehouse
categories.whenToUse: A storage warehouse — tall racks, crates, vast empty floor.
categories.notWhen: A working factory line -> factory.

categories.name: Workshop
categories.whenToUse: A craft/mechanic workshop — workbench, tools, work-in-progress.
categories.notWhen: A fantasy forge with an anvil -> blacksmith. A home garage -> garage.

categories.name: Studio
categories.whenToUse: An art / music / recording studio — creative gear, open and lit.
categories.notWhen: A film set stage -> theater_stage.

categories.name: Classroom
categories.whenToUse: A school classroom — desks, a board, the teaching front.
categories.notWhen: A tiered university hall -> lecture_hall. A school corridor -> school_hallway.

categories.name: School Hallway
categories.whenToUse: A school corridor — rows of lockers, classroom doors.
categories.notWhen: A home/building corridor -> hallway. A classroom -> classroom.

categories.name: Lecture Hall
categories.whenToUse: A large tiered lecture theatre / auditorium with banked seating.
categories.notWhen: A flat classroom -> classroom.

categories.name: Library
categories.whenToUse: A library / reading hall — tall shelves, study tables, quiet.
categories.notWhen: A retail bookshop -> bookstore.

categories.name: Cafeteria
categories.whenToUse: A school/work canteen — long tables, a serving line, communal.
categories.notWhen: A restaurant -> restaurant. A food court -> shopping_mall.

categories.name: Locker Room
categories.whenToUse: A sports/school changing room — metal lockers, benches, tiled.
categories.notWhen: A bathroom -> bathroom. A public bath -> onsen_bathhouse.

categories.name: Schoolyard
categories.whenToUse: A school's outdoor courtyard/grounds — open area by the building.
categories.notWhen: A public park -> park.

categories.name: Hospital Room
categories.whenToUse: A hospital patient room — bed, monitors, clinical and quiet.
categories.notWhen: A corridor -> hospital_hallway. A surgery -> operating_room. A small clinic -> clinic.

categories.name: Hospital Hallway
categories.whenToUse: A clinical hospital corridor — pale, sterile, fluorescent.
categories.notWhen: A patient room -> hospital_room.

categories.name: Clinic
categories.whenToUse: A small clinic / doctor's exam room — exam table, supplies.
categories.notWhen: A large hospital room -> hospital_room.

categories.name: Operating Room
categories.whenToUse: A surgical theatre — operating table, bright lamps, sterile.
categories.notWhen: A patient recovery room -> hospital_room.

categories.name: Waiting Room
categories.whenToUse: A generic waiting area — rows of chairs, reception, magazines.
categories.notWhen: An exam room -> clinic.

categories.name: Morgue
categories.whenToUse: A morgue — steel drawers, exam slab, cold and clinical.
categories.notWhen: A surgery -> operating_room. A graveyard outside -> graveyard.

categories.name: Gym
categories.whenToUse: A fitness gym — weights, machines, mirrors.
categories.notWhen: A sports field -> outdoors. A locker room -> locker_room.

categories.name: Swimming Pool
categories.whenToUse: A swimming pool — water, deck, lanes (indoor or outdoor).
categories.notWhen: A natural lake -> lake. A hot spring -> onsen_bathhouse.

categories.name: Onsen / Bathhouse
categories.whenToUse: A hot-spring bath / public bathhouse — steaming water, stone, wood.
categories.notWhen: A private home bathroom -> bathroom. A swimming pool -> pool.

categories.name: Arcade
categories.whenToUse: A game arcade — glowing cabinets, neon, dim and colorful.
categories.notWhen: A casino -> casino.

categories.name: Amusement Park
categories.whenToUse: A theme/amusement park — rides, ferris wheel, booths, lights.
categories.notWhen: A street festival / matsuri -> festival.

categories.name: Festival
categories.whenToUse: A festival / fair / matsuri — stalls, lanterns, string lights, fireworks; a celebratory outdoor event.
categories.notWhen: A permanent rides park -> amusement_park. A regular market -> market.

categories.name: Casino
categories.whenToUse: A casino gaming floor — slots, tables, plush and gilded.
categories.notWhen: An arcade -> arcade.

categories.name: Movie Theater
categories.whenToUse: A cinema auditorium — banked seats facing a big screen, dark.
categories.notWhen: A live stage with curtains -> theater_stage.

categories.name: Theater Stage
categories.whenToUse: A performance theatre — curtained stage, balconies, ornate house.
categories.notWhen: A cinema screen -> movie_theater. A concert venue -> concert_hall.

categories.name: Concert Hall
categories.whenToUse: A live music venue / concert stage — lights, gear, the crowd floor.
categories.notWhen: A theatrical play stage -> theater_stage.

categories.name: Museum
categories.whenToUse: A museum / gallery hall — displays, exhibits, hushed and lit.
categories.notWhen: A library -> library.

categories.name: Aquarium
categories.whenToUse: A public aquarium — vast glowing tanks, blue light, dim walkway.

categories.name: Karaoke Room
categories.whenToUse: A private karaoke booth — couch, screen, mics, neon mood light.
categories.notWhen: A nightclub dance floor -> nightclub.

categories.name: Church
categories.whenToUse: A western church/cathedral/chapel interior — nave, pews, stained glass.
categories.notWhen: An eastern temple or shrine -> temple_shrine.

categories.name: Temple / Shrine
categories.whenToUse: An eastern temple/shrine — torii, lanterns, incense, tiered roofs.
categories.notWhen: A western church -> church. A grand throne hall -> throne_room.

categories.name: Graveyard
categories.whenToUse: A cemetery/graveyard — headstones, mist, somber and still.
categories.notWhen: An underground tomb -> catacombs.

categories.name: Forest
categories.whenToUse: Outdoors among trees/woodland — hiking, camping, walking through woods.
categories.notWhen: A manicured park -> park. A garden -> garden. A jungle -> jungle.

categories.name: Jungle
categories.whenToUse: A dense tropical rainforest/jungle — broad leaves, vines, humid.
categories.notWhen: A temperate forest -> forest.

categories.name: Bamboo Forest
categories.whenToUse: A bamboo grove — tall stalks, filtered light, tranquil east-asian feel.
categories.notWhen: A regular forest -> forest.

categories.name: Beach
categories.whenToUse: A sea coast / sandy beach — sand, surf, horizon.
categories.notWhen: Open water seen from a boat -> ocean. A pool -> pool.

categories.name: Open Ocean
categories.whenToUse: Open water / the sea from a boat — endless waves and horizon.
categories.notWhen: A sandy shoreline -> beach. A ship's deck -> ship_deck.

categories.name: Park
categories.whenToUse: A manicured urban park — lawns, paths, benches, tended greenery.
categories.notWhen: Wild woods -> forest. An ornamental garden -> garden.

categories.name: Garden
categories.whenToUse: A cultivated ornamental garden — flower beds, hedges, trellises.
categories.notWhen: A public park with benches -> park. A backyard -> backyard.

categories.name: Field / Meadow
categories.whenToUse: An open grassy field / meadow — tall grass, wildflowers, big sky.
categories.notWhen: Cultivated farmland -> farm. A park -> park.

categories.name: Mountain
categories.whenToUse: Mountainous terrain — peaks, ridges, trails, high vistas.
categories.notWhen: A flat field -> field_meadow. A cave entrance -> cave.

categories.name: Riverbank
categories.whenToUse: The bank of a river/stream — flowing water, reeds, trees.
categories.notWhen: A still lake -> lake. A waterfall -> waterfall.

categories.name: Lake
categories.whenToUse: A lakeside — still open water, far shores, calm.
categories.notWhen: A flowing river -> riverbank. The sea -> ocean.

categories.name: Waterfall
categories.whenToUse: A waterfall — falling water, mist, mossy rocks, a plunge pool.
categories.notWhen: A calm river -> riverbank.

categories.name: Cave
categories.whenToUse: A cave / cavern — rock walls, stalactites, dim and enclosed.
categories.notWhen: A built stone dungeon -> dungeon. Catacombs -> catacombs.

categories.name: Desert
categories.whenToUse: A desert — sand dunes, barren expanse, big sky.
categories.notWhen: A snowy waste -> snowy_landscape. A canyon is fine here.

categories.name: Snowy Landscape
categories.whenToUse: A snow-covered winter landscape — white fields, frosted trees.
categories.notWhen: A desert -> desert. A mountain -> mountain.

categories.name: Swamp
categories.whenToUse: A swamp / marsh / bog — murky water, gnarled trees, fog.
categories.notWhen: A clear riverbank -> riverbank.

categories.name: Countryside
categories.whenToUse: Open rural countryside — fields, hedgerows, a country road.
categories.notWhen: A working farm yard -> farm. A wild meadow -> field_meadow.

categories.name: Farm
categories.whenToUse: A farm yard — barn, fields, silo, rustic.
categories.notWhen: Open countryside without buildings -> countryside.

categories.name: Cherry Blossoms
categories.whenToUse: A sakura grove / blossom-lined path — pink petals, spring, iconic.
categories.notWhen: A plain park -> park. A garden -> garden.

categories.name: Campsite
categories.whenToUse: An outdoor camp — tent, campfire, in the wild.
categories.notWhen: A forest with no camp -> forest.

categories.name: Throne Room
categories.whenToUse: A royal throne hall — the seat of power, grand and ceremonial.
categories.notWhen: A general castle interior -> castle_interior. A temple -> temple_shrine.

categories.name: Castle Interior
categories.whenToUse: Inside a castle — great halls, stone corridors, medieval grandeur.
categories.notWhen: The throne dais specifically -> throne_room. Outside walls -> castle_exterior.

categories.name: Castle Exterior
categories.whenToUse: A castle from outside — towers, battlements, courtyard, gates.
categories.notWhen: Inside the halls -> castle_interior.

categories.name: Dungeon
categories.whenToUse: A medieval stone dungeon/prison — cells, chains, torch-lit stone.
categories.notWhen: A modern jail -> prison. A basement -> basement. Catacombs -> catacombs.

categories.name: Medieval Village
categories.whenToUse: A medieval/fantasy village — thatched cottages, dirt lanes, rustic.
categories.notWhen: An open-air market specifically -> market. A castle -> castle_exterior.

categories.name: Fantasy Tavern
categories.whenToUse: A medieval/fantasy inn or tavern — hearth, wooden tables, adventurers' haunt.
categories.notWhen: A modern bar -> bar_tavern.

categories.name: Ancient Ruins
categories.whenToUse: Overgrown ancient stone ruins — toppled columns, vines, lost grandeur.
categories.notWhen: A modern ruined city -> post_apocalyptic. Underground tombs -> catacombs.

categories.name: Wizard Tower
categories.whenToUse: A mage's tower/study — arcane tomes, potions, magic circles.
categories.notWhen: A normal library -> library. An alchemy bench -> blacksmith/workshop.

categories.name: Blacksmith Forge
categories.whenToUse: A smithy/forge — anvil, glowing furnace, weapons and tools.
categories.notWhen: A modern mechanic workshop -> workshop.

categories.name: Catacombs
categories.whenToUse: Underground catacombs/crypt — bone-lined tunnels, tombs, gloom.
categories.notWhen: A dungeon with cells -> dungeon. A graveyard above ground -> graveyard.

categories.name: Arena / Colosseum
categories.whenToUse: A colosseum/arena — sand floor, tiered stone seats, spectacle.
categories.notWhen: A modern sports stadium reads here too; a concert -> concert_hall.

categories.name: Ship Deck
categories.whenToUse: The deck of a sailing/pirate ship at sea — masts, rigging, sails.
categories.notWhen: A harbor on land -> harbor. Below deck cabins read as 'ship_deck' too.

categories.name: Battlefield
categories.whenToUse: A war-torn battlefield — churned earth, smoke, scattered ruin.
categories.notWhen: An intact village -> medieval_village. A modern ruined city -> post_apocalyptic.

categories.name: Spaceship Interior
categories.whenToUse: Inside a spaceship/space station — corridors, consoles, viewports.
categories.notWhen: An airplane cabin -> airplane_interior. A research lab -> lab.

categories.name: Futuristic City
categories.whenToUse: A futuristic/cyberpunk cityscape — neon towers, holograms, high-tech.
categories.notWhen: A present-day street -> city_street.

categories.name: Laboratory
categories.whenToUse: A research lab — clean tech, equipment, screens, experiments.
categories.notWhen: A hospital surgery -> operating_room. A wizard's study -> wizard_tower.

categories.name: Alien Planet
categories.whenToUse: An alien world's surface — strange terrain, exotic sky, otherworldly.
categories.notWhen: Earthly desert -> desert. A space view -> space.

categories.name: Outer Space
categories.whenToUse: Open space / a starfield view — stars, nebula, planets, void.
categories.notWhen: Inside a ship -> spaceship_interior. A planet surface -> alien_planet.

categories.name: Post-Apocalyptic City
categories.whenToUse: A ruined modern city reclaimed by decay — collapsed, overgrown, desolate.
categories.notWhen: Ancient stone ruins -> ancient_ruins. An abandoned building interior -> abandoned_building.

categories.name: Bunker
categories.whenToUse: A fortified underground bunker/shelter — concrete, pipes, blast door.
categories.notWhen: A basement -> basement. A lab -> lab.

categories.name: Abandoned Building
categories.whenToUse: A derelict/abandoned building interior — decay, dust, broken, eerie.
categories.notWhen: A ruined modern cityscape -> post_apocalyptic.

categories.name: Sewer
categories.whenToUse: An underground sewer/tunnel — brick channel, dark water, grime.
categories.notWhen: A cave -> cave. Catacombs -> catacombs.

categories.name: Prison
categories.whenToUse: A modern jail/prison — barred cell block, steel, sterile and harsh.
categories.notWhen: A medieval stone dungeon -> dungeon.

categories.name: Interrogation Room
categories.whenToUse: A bleak interrogation room — table, lamp, one-way mirror, tense.
categories.notWhen: A courtroom -> courtroom.

categories.name: Courtroom
categories.whenToUse: A courtroom — judge's bench, stand, gallery, formal wood.
categories.notWhen: An interrogation room -> interrogation_room.

categories.name: Hotel Room
categories.whenToUse: A paid hotel/motel room — neat impersonal lodging, made bed.
categories.notWhen: Someone's own bedroom at home -> bedroom.

categories.name: Greenhouse
categories.whenToUse: A glass greenhouse/conservatory — lush plants under glass, warm and humid.
categories.notWhen: An outdoor garden -> garden.

categories.name: Hell
categories.whenToUse: An infernal underworld of fire — hell, the inferno, a demonic hellscape.
categories.notWhen: A gloomy realm of the dead -> underworld. A summoning room -> ritual_chamber.

categories.name: Heaven
categories.whenToUse: A divine celestial paradise — heaven, the sky realm, a god's domain.
categories.notWhen: Plain outer space -> space. A surreal dream -> dreamscape.

categories.name: Underworld
categories.whenToUse: The shadowy realm of the dead / spirit world — gloomy, liminal.
categories.notWhen: A fiery hell -> hell. Bone catacombs -> catacombs.

categories.name: The Void
categories.whenToUse: Featureless infinite nothingness — the void, limbo, between worlds.
categories.notWhen: A starry space scene -> space. A surreal dream -> surreal_dimension.

categories.name: Surreal Dimension
categories.whenToUse: A bizarre impossible other-dimension — eldritch, warped, unreal.
categories.notWhen: A soft pretty dream -> dreamscape. A god realm -> heaven.

categories.name: Cyberspace
categories.whenToUse: Inside a computer / virtual reality — a digital grid world, the net.
categories.notWhen: A real futuristic city -> futuristic_city.

categories.name: Floating Islands
categories.whenToUse: Land masses floating in the sky — a fantastical aerial realm.
categories.notWhen: A surreal warped dimension -> surreal_dimension.

categories.name: Brothel
categories.whenToUse: A bordello / pleasure house common room — opulent, sensual lounge.
categories.notWhen: The private bedroom there -> brothel_room. A normal bar -> bar_tavern.

categories.name: Boudoir
categories.whenToUse: A private intimate / courtesan's bedroom — sensual boudoir.
categories.notWhen: An ordinary home bedroom -> bedroom. A hotel room -> hotel_room. The lounge -> brothel.

categories.name: Strip Club
categories.whenToUse: A strip club / gentlemen's club — stage, pole, neon, dark.
categories.notWhen: A regular dance club -> nightclub. A brothel -> brothel.

categories.name: Red Light District
categories.whenToUse: A seedy red-light street exterior — neon, lanterns, vice district.
categories.notWhen: A generic neon street -> city_street. The interior -> brothel.

categories.name: Harem Chamber
categories.whenToUse: A lavish harem / seraglio chamber — cushions, drapes, ornate, sensual.
categories.notWhen: A throne room -> throne_room. A boudoir -> brothel_room.

categories.name: Dragon's Lair
categories.whenToUse: A dragon's hoard cavern — piles of gold, bones, smoldering, vast.
categories.notWhen: A treasure room without the cave -> treasure_vault. A plain cave -> cave.

categories.name: Fairy Realm
categories.whenToUse: A magical fae realm / enchanted glade — glowing, whimsical, ethereal.
categories.notWhen: An ordinary forest -> forest. A surreal dimension -> surreal_dimension.

categories.name: Mage Academy
categories.whenToUse: A school of magic — grand enchanted academy halls.
categories.notWhen: A normal classroom -> classroom. A wizard's private study -> wizard_tower.

categories.name: Treasure Vault
categories.whenToUse: A treasure room / vault — piled gold, jewels, artifacts, glittering.
categories.notWhen: A dragon's cavern hoard -> dragon_lair.

categories.name: Egyptian Tomb
categories.whenToUse: An ancient Egyptian burial tomb / pyramid interior — hieroglyphs, sarcophagus.
categories.notWhen: Generic stone ruins -> ancient_ruins. Bone catacombs -> catacombs.

categories.name: Ritual Chamber
categories.whenToUse: An occult ritual / summoning chamber — circle, candles, altar, ominous.
categories.notWhen: A fiery hell -> hell. A church -> church.

categories.name: Moon Surface
categories.whenToUse: An airless moon / lunar landscape — craters, regolith, earth in the sky.
categories.notWhen: An alien planet with atmosphere -> alien_planet. Open space -> space.

categories.name: Underwater
categories.whenToUse: Beneath the sea — a coral reef / ocean floor, blue and sunlit.
categories.notWhen: The surface of the sea -> ocean. An aquarium tank -> aquarium.

categories.name: Volcano
categories.whenToUse: A volcanic landscape — erupting peak, lava flows, ash, blackened rock.
categories.notWhen: An infernal hell -> hell. A regular mountain -> mountain.

categories.name: Glacier
categories.whenToUse: A glacier / ice field — towering blue ice, frozen, cold and stark.
categories.notWhen: A snowy forest/field -> snowy_landscape. An ice cave -> cave.

categories.name: Vampire Castle
categories.whenToUse: A gothic vampire/Dracula castle from outside — spires, full moon, bats, dread.
categories.notWhen: A normal fantasy castle -> castle_exterior. The interior -> vampire_castle_interior.

categories.name: Vampire Castle Interior
categories.whenToUse: Inside a vampire/gothic horror castle — red drapes, candelabra, coffin, dread.
categories.notWhen: A normal castle interior -> castle_interior. A haunted manor -> haunted_mansion.

categories.name: Mansion
categories.whenToUse: A grand wealthy mansion / manor interior — opulent estate, grand staircase.
categories.notWhen: A medieval castle -> castle_interior. A derelict spooky one -> haunted_mansion.

categories.name: Haunted Mansion
categories.whenToUse: A spooky derelict haunted mansion interior — cobwebs, sheets, ghostly.
categories.notWhen: A vampire castle -> vampire_castle_interior. A plain abandoned building -> abandoned_building.

categories.name: Containment Facility
categories.whenToUse: A clandestine containment / SCP-style facility — blast doors, cells, clinical dread.
categories.notWhen: A normal research lab -> lab. A biohazard lab -> biohazard_lab. A prison -> prison.

categories.name: Biohazard Lab
categories.whenToUse: A biohazard / quarantine containment lab — hazmat, airlocks, green hazard glow.
categories.notWhen: A clean research lab -> lab. A containment facility -> scp_facility.

categories.name: Sunflower Field
categories.whenToUse: A field of sunflowers — golden, tall, sunny, idyllic.
categories.notWhen: A generic grassy field -> field_meadow. A flower garden -> garden.

categories.name: Jungle Ruins
categories.whenToUse: Overgrown ancient temple ruins in a jungle — vines, mossy stone, lost (Aztec/Mayan/Angkor).
categories.notWhen: Open stone ruins in the dry -> ancient_ruins. A plain jungle -> jungle.

categories.name: Underground Waterfall
categories.whenToUse: A waterfall inside a cavern — underground grotto, glowing pool, mist.
categories.notWhen: An open-air waterfall -> waterfall. A plain cave -> cave.

categories.name: Underground Lake
categories.whenToUse: A still subterranean lake in a cavern — glowing water, reflections, vast.
categories.notWhen: A cavern waterfall -> underground_waterfall. A plain cave -> cave.

categories.name: Glowing Mushroom Cave
categories.whenToUse: A cavern of glowing mushrooms / bioluminescent fungi — magical, alien, glowing.
categories.notWhen: A plain cave -> cave. A surface fairy glade -> fairy_realm.

categories.name: Firefly Grove
categories.whenToUse: A night grove glowing with fireflies — dreamy, golden lights, magical calm.
categories.notWhen: A plain forest -> forest. A fairy realm -> fairy_realm.

categories.name: Stadium
categories.whenToUse: A modern sports stadium / arena — tiered seats, field, floodlights.
categories.notWhen: A gladiatorial colosseum -> arena. A concert venue -> concert_hall.

categories.name: Dojo
categories.whenToUse: A martial-arts dojo / training hall — wooden floor, weapon racks, disciplined.
categories.notWhen: A modern gym -> gym. A temple -> temple_shrine.

categories.name: Tundra
categories.whenToUse: An arctic tundra — flat frozen plain, aurora, stark and cold.
categories.notWhen: A snowy forest/field -> snowy_landscape. A glacier -> glacier.

categories.name: Resort
categories.whenToUse: A luxury tropical/beach resort — pool, palms, loungers, vacation paradise.
categories.notWhen: A plain beach -> beach. A swimming pool only -> pool.

categories.name: Cruise Ship
categories.whenToUse: A modern cruise liner's deck — pool, loungers, railings, open sea.
categories.notWhen: A sailing/pirate ship deck -> ship_deck. A cabin inside -> ship_cabin.

categories.name: Ship Cabin
categories.whenToUse: Inside a ship's cabin / quarters — wood panels, bunk, porthole.
categories.notWhen: The open deck -> ship_deck / cruise_ship.

categories.name: Scrapyard
categories.whenToUse: A junkyard / scrapyard — heaps of rusted cars and scrap metal, gritty.
categories.notWhen: A garbage landfill -> garbage_dump. A warehouse -> warehouse.

categories.name: Garbage Dump
categories.whenToUse: A landfill / garbage dump — mountains of trash, bleak and grimy.
categories.notWhen: A metal junkyard -> scrapyard.

categories.name: Wasteland
categories.whenToUse: A barren post-apocalyptic wasteland — cracked earth, dust, dead, desolate (Mad Max).
categories.notWhen: A ruined city -> post_apocalyptic. A sand desert -> desert.

categories.name: Film Set
categories.whenToUse: A movie/TV production set — cameras, lighting rigs, green screen, equipment.
categories.notWhen: An art/recording studio -> studio. A theatre stage -> theater_stage.

categories.name: Adult Film Set
categories.whenToUse: An adult-film shooting set — a staged bed surrounded by cameras and lights (empty set).
categories.notWhen: A normal film set -> film_set. A boudoir -> brothel_room.

categories.name: City Skyline
categories.whenToUse: An aerial/distant skyline of a big city — a metropolis establishing shot (Gotham=gothic, NYC=modern, Tokyo=neon).
categories.notWhen: A street-level view -> city_street. A futuristic neon city -> futuristic_city.

categories.name: Desert City
categories.whenToUse: A city/settlement in the desert — sandstone, domes, oasis town (ancient or modern).
categories.notWhen: Empty dunes -> desert. A generic city -> city_street.

categories.name: Highway
categories.whenToUse: An open highway / freeway — long road, overpasses, road trip.
categories.notWhen: A city street with buildings -> city_street. A quiet residential street -> suburban_street.

categories.name: Ancient Temple
categories.whenToUse: A grand intact ancient temple — Greco-Roman / Mesoamerican columns and altar.
categories.notWhen: An east-asian shrine -> temple_shrine. A ruined version -> ancient_ruins. An egyptian tomb -> egyptian_tomb.

categories.name: Wedding Altar
categories.whenToUse: A decorated wedding ceremony altar / venue — floral arch, aisle, chairs.
categories.notWhen: A church interior -> church. A garden -> garden.

categories.name: Earth from Orbit
categories.whenToUse: Earth seen from space / the edge of the atmosphere — the blue planet, orbital view.
categories.notWhen: Deep starfield space -> space. A planet surface -> alien_planet / moon_surface.

categories.name: Black Hole
categories.whenToUse: Space near a black hole — accretion disk, warped light, cosmic dread.
categories.notWhen: A plain starfield -> space. Earth from orbit -> earth_from_orbit.

categories.name: Oasis
categories.whenToUse: A desert oasis — a palm-ringed spring pool amid the dunes, lush and calm.
categories.notWhen: Empty dunes -> desert. A city in the desert -> desert_city.

categories.name: Zoo
categories.whenToUse: A zoo — pathways between animal enclosures and habitats (no animals shown).
categories.notWhen: A manicured park -> park. An aquarium -> aquarium.

categories.name: Convention Hall
categories.whenToUse: A comics/anime convention expo floor (Comic-Con / CCXP type) — booths, banners, big hall.
categories.notWhen: A shopping mall -> shopping_mall. A museum -> museum.

categories.name: Slums
categories.whenToUse: A slum / favela / shantytown — stacked makeshift houses, narrow alleys, gritty.
categories.notWhen: A normal city street -> city_street. A residential street -> suburban_street.

categories.name: Backrooms
categories.whenToUse: The liminal 'backrooms' — endless yellow wallpapered rooms, fluorescent hum, eerie.
categories.notWhen: A normal office -> office. An abandoned building -> abandoned_building.

categories.name: Liminal Pool
categories.whenToUse: Eerie empty 'poolrooms' — silent tiled pools, liminal dread.
categories.notWhen: A normal swimming pool -> pool. The backrooms -> backrooms.

categories.name: Log Cabin
categories.whenToUse: A cozy rustic log cabin interior — fireplace, logs, snug retreat in the woods.
categories.notWhen: A modern home living room -> living_room. A ship's cabin -> ship_cabin.

categories.name: Bakery
categories.whenToUse: A bakery / patisserie — bread, pastries, brick oven, warm and homey.
categories.notWhen: A coffee shop -> cafe.

categories.name: Tattoo Parlor
categories.whenToUse: A tattoo parlor / studio — chair, flash art walls, neon, moody.
categories.notWhen: A doctor's exam room -> clinic. A barbershop is similar but for hair.

categories.name: Dance Studio
categories.whenToUse: A dance / ballet studio — mirrored wall, barre, sprung floor, airy.
categories.notWhen: A gym with weights -> gym. A martial arts dojo -> dojo.

categories.name: Observatory
categories.whenToUse: An astronomical observatory — big telescope, open dome, stars, dim.
categories.notWhen: A planetarium projects stars on the dome; open space -> space.

categories.name: Savanna
categories.whenToUse: An african savanna / grassland plain — acacia trees, golden grass, wide and warm.
categories.notWhen: A grassy meadow -> field_meadow. A desert -> desert.

categories.name: Canyon
categories.whenToUse: A red-rock canyon / gorge — towering striped cliffs, a deep ravine (Grand Canyon-like).
categories.notWhen: Sand dunes -> desert. A mountain -> mountain.

categories.name: Rice Paddies
categories.whenToUse: Terraced rice fields — flooded green tiers, misty, serene asian countryside.
categories.notWhen: A dry grassy field -> field_meadow. A farm -> farm.

categories.name: Autumn Forest
categories.whenToUse: A forest in autumn — fiery red and gold foliage, fallen leaves, crisp.
categories.notWhen: A green summer forest -> forest. A snowy forest -> snowy_landscape.

categories.name: Coastal Town
categories.whenToUse: A picturesque seaside / fishing town — cliffside houses, harbor, cozy coastal.
categories.notWhen: A working dock -> harbor. A plain beach -> beach.

categories.name: Airship
categories.whenToUse: The deck of a flying airship / dirigible — sailing the clouds, steampunk/fantasy.
categories.notWhen: A sailing ship on water -> ship_deck. A floating island -> floating_islands.

categories.name: Ice Palace
categories.whenToUse: A palace/castle of ice — translucent blue ice halls, frozen throne, ethereal.
categories.notWhen: A stone castle -> castle_interior. A glacier outdoors -> glacier.

categories.name: Crystal Cavern
categories.whenToUse: A cave full of giant glowing crystals — violet/cyan glow, magical.
categories.notWhen: A plain cave -> cave. A glowing mushroom cave -> mushroom_cave.

categories.name: War Camp
categories.whenToUse: An army's war/military camp — tents, campfires, banners, on the eve of battle.
categories.notWhen: Active combat ground -> battlefield. A peaceful campsite -> campsite.

categories.name: Submarine Interior
categories.whenToUse: Inside a submarine — cramped control room, pipes, periscope, claustrophobic.
categories.notWhen: A spaceship corridor -> spaceship_interior. A ship cabin -> ship_cabin.

categories.name: Power Plant
categories.whenToUse: An industrial power plant — cooling towers, turbines, pipes, industrial.
categories.notWhen: A factory floor -> factory. A research lab -> lab.

categories.name: Abandoned Asylum
categories.whenToUse: A derelict mental asylum — barred cells, decay, a rusted wheelchair, dread.
categories.notWhen: A working hospital -> hospital_hallway. A plain abandoned building -> abandoned_building. A prison -> prison.

categories.name: Lighthouse
categories.whenToUse: A coastal lighthouse — tower on a cliff, sweeping beam, crashing sea, dramatic.
categories.notWhen: A working harbor with docks -> harbor. A seaside town -> coastal_town.

categories.name: Neutral
categories.whenToUse: Fallback ambience when the location is unknown/ambiguous and there's nothing to keep.
categories.notWhen: Any identifiable place -> that place's slug.

categories.name: Dreamscape
categories.whenToUse: A surreal/dream sequence — ethereal, impossible, soft and unreal.
categories.notWhen: A concrete place -> that slug. Plain ambience -> neutral.
